data.title: Amentum consortium wins $207 million contract for Dutch new nuclear program with 2 gigawatt-scale power plants.
data.description: A consortium spearheaded by Amentum (NYSE: AMTM) in Chantilly, Virginia, has secured a fresh contract to deliver program management and technical expertise for the planning and establishment of nuclear new build initiatives in the Netherlands. Known as NEXUS-NL, the consortium includes Amentum, Arcadis, Tractebel, and NRG PALLAS. Their mandate involves the development of potentially two new gigawatt-scale power plants to bolster the country's decarbonization objectives and energy stability, while working closely with the Nuclear Energy Organisation.

data.title: AI website builders dominate a $6.3B market, facing professionalism challenges. 98% of small businesses eye AI adoption by 2026.
data.description: AI-powered website builders have been instrumental in accelerating development processes, although they face challenges in terms of strategic clarity. The market for these tools is witnessing significant growth and is projected to reach $6.3 billion. Furthermore, a notable statistic reveals that 98% of small businesses are gearing up to incorporate AI technology by 2026.

data.title: Nordic firms in the ISG report are moving from selective public cloud to multicloud operating models for modernization.
data.description: Business analysis firm ISG reported that companies in the Nordic region are transitioning from using public cloud services on a limited basis to adopting broader multicloud operating strategies. This shift highlights a trend towards embracing multiple cloud platforms simultaneously. The gradual evolution indicates a strategic maneuver for enterprises in the region, emphasizing a move towards diversified cloud utilization. This adjustment reflects the growing complexity in cloud service adoption among businesses in the Nordics.

data.title: Skyharbour plans 15,000m diamond drilling in 2026 at Russell Lake Uranium Joint Ventures with Denison Mines Corp.
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on January 22, 2026, Skyharbour Resources Ltd. (TSX-V: SYH) (OTCQX: SYHBF) (Frankfurt: SC1P) announced its 2026 exploration campaign for the newly-formed Russel Lake joint ventures with Denison Mines Corp. (TSX: DML) (NYSE American: DNN). This campaign will cover Wheeler North, RL, and Getty East joint ventures with plans for over 15,000 meters of diamond drilling. These joint ventures were established after a strategic transaction with Denison in December 2025, leading to the reorganization of the former Russell Lake uranium project into four separate property joint ventures collectively known as the "Russell Lake Joint Ventures."

data.title: iQIYI (NASDAQ: IQ) to announce Q4 and FY 2025 financial results on Feb 26, 2026; Ended Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, iQIYI, Inc. (NASDAQ: IQ), a prominent online entertainment video services provider in China, revealed its plan to disclose financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year that concluded on December 31, 2025. The announcement stated that this information will be made available before the U.S. market opens on February 26, 2026.
Details of share buyback transactions between Jan 15-21, 2026 revealed today. 100,000 shares worth $1 million repurchased.

data.title: Japan halts nuclear plant restart after malfunction. Restarted after decade of dormancy post-2011 Fukushima Daiichi meltdown.
data.description: A significant setback happened shortly after one of the largest nuclear facilities in the world resumed operations, marking the end of over ten years of inactivity after the 2011 Fukushima Daiichi disaster.

data.title: Investor demand leads to strong first close for Flashpoint's $75-100M Direct Secondary Fund, supporting tech companies.
data.description: Flashpoint's second fund is continuing its successful approach of offering shareholder liquidity to fast-growing technology enterprises established by European and Israeli founders. Notable achievements include investments in Printify, Preply, and Chess.com. The fund is based in London and the news was announced on January 22, 2026.

data.title: QuickBooks deemed top HMRC-compliant platform for UK SMEs. Expert Consumers identify in recent article.
data.description: A recently published article by Expert Consumers reveals that QuickBooks is consistently recognized by small and medium sized enterprises in the UK as a top HMRC compliant accounting platform. The report emphasizes the growing importance of accounting software in various enterprises, with a significant emphasis on QuickBooks' popularity among businesses.

data.title: Yum China discloses possible quarterly dividend under HKEX rules. Compliance with advance notice requirement.
data.description: Yum China Holdings, Inc. disclosed on Jan. 22, 2026, that it is listed on NYSE under YUMC and HKEX under 9987. The company, based in Shanghai, adhered to the rules of the Stock Exchange in Hong Kong by providing advance notice as stipulated.
